savedPrompts.title: Analyze Engine
savedPrompts.useCase: Break down a topic into clear parts, identify patterns, and explain the core issue.
savedPrompts.summary: Use when the user needs structured analysis without a full workflow.

savedPrompts.title: Voloditha Framework Analysis
savedPrompts.useCase: Analyze a problem through observation, structure, and transformation.
savedPrompts.summary: Useful when the user needs a more conceptual or system-level interpretation.

savedPrompts.title: Decision and Trade-off Engine
savedPrompts.useCase: Compare alternatives, expose trade-offs, and recommend a direction.
savedPrompts.summary: Use for decision support with explicit trade-off logic.

savedPrompts.title: Research Synthesizer
savedPrompts.useCase: Combine multiple inputs into one clear synthesis with implications.
savedPrompts.summary: Use when the user wants research distilled into something practical.

savedPrompts.title: Root Cause Analyzer
savedPrompts.useCase: Move from symptoms to underlying cause.
savedPrompts.summary: Use when the user describes a recurring problem, issue, or failure.

savedPrompts.title: Problem Solving Engine
savedPrompts.useCase: Turn a problem into actions, solution paths, and next steps.
savedPrompts.summary: Use for practical troubleshooting and recovery planning.

savedPrompts.title: Requirements Discovery
savedPrompts.useCase: Identify business needs, constraints, assumptions, and non-functional requirements.
savedPrompts.summary: Use before proposing architecture or solution design.

savedPrompts.title: High-Level Architecture Design
savedPrompts.useCase: Create a structured high-level design with major components and flows.
savedPrompts.summary: Use when the user needs a clear architectural direction.

savedPrompts.title: Architecture Review
savedPrompts.useCase: Review architecture for risks, weaknesses, alignment, and operational fit.
savedPrompts.summary: Use when validating or stress-testing a proposed design.

savedPrompts.title: Strategy Framing
savedPrompts.useCase: Define the strategic problem, objective, and decision context.
savedPrompts.summary: Use before deeper market or decision work.

savedPrompts.title: Market and Positioning Analysis
savedPrompts.useCase: Assess a product, offering, or company in relation to competitors and market context.
savedPrompts.summary: Use for market research, differentiation, and positioning.

savedPrompts.title: Execution Strategy
savedPrompts.useCase: Turn a direction into execution phases, priorities, and sequencing.
savedPrompts.summary: Use when the user already knows what they want and needs a path forward.

savedPrompts.title: Prompt System Design
savedPrompts.useCase: Design a structured prompt pattern, workflow, or reasoning route.
savedPrompts.summary: Use when building reusable prompt systems rather than one-off prompts.

savedPrompts.title: Workflow Builder
savedPrompts.useCase: Turn a broad task into a repeatable workflow with distinct steps.
savedPrompts.summary: Use when consistency and repeatability matter.

savedPrompts.title: Executive Brief Writer
savedPrompts.useCase: Convert analysis into concise executive-ready communication.
savedPrompts.summary: Use for leadership summaries, memos, and decision briefs.

savedPrompts.title: Technical Writing Builder
savedPrompts.useCase: Draft structured technical documentation, architecture notes, or implementation guidance.
savedPrompts.summary: Use when clarity and technical precision matter.

savedPrompts.title: Problem to Root Cause to Solution
savedPrompts.useCase: Follow a predefined sequence from symptoms to diagnosis to action.
savedPrompts.summary: Best for troubleshooting, blockers, incidents, and persistent issues.

savedPrompts.title: Research to Strategy to Decision
savedPrompts.useCase: Move from research through strategic interpretation into decision support.
savedPrompts.summary: Best for strategic questions that need evidence and judgment.

savedPrompts.title: Architecture to Risk to Recommendation
savedPrompts.useCase: Use architecture design, review risk, then produce a recommendation.
savedPrompts.summary: Best for solution design, technical architecture, and platform decisions.

savedPrompts.title: Idea to Validation to Execution
savedPrompts.useCase: Take an idea from concept through validation toward practical execution.
savedPrompts.summary: Best for new product, concept, or initiative shaping.
